snippet.title: iOS Dev Job Interview - Must Know Topics
snippet.description:
I put together a collection of my best iOS Developer job interview topic videos to help you prepare for your interview. It's impossible to know what questions will be asked during an interview, but these topics are VERY commonly asked about:

Topics covered:
- Network Calls
- Classes vs. Structs
- Generics
- Closures
- Filter, Map, Reduce
- Array vs. Set
- Unwrapping Optionals
- Unit Tests
- Singletons
- Dependency Injection
- Delegates & Protocols (UIKit)
- View Lifecycle (UIKit)
- Concurrency & Threading
- ARC & Retain Cycles (UIKit)

Need help with something specific? Book a call with me:
https://seanallen.teachable.com/p/call?video=XTAziR-tY-A

My iOS Dev Courses:
https://seanallen.teachable.com/?video=XTAziR-tY-A

Twitter:
Sean Allen - https://twitter.com/seanallen_dev

Hired.com:
https://hired.com/x/1n01g

Book and learning recommendations that help out the channel if you decide to purchase (Affiliate Links):

Paul Hudson's Hacking With Swift:
https://gumroad.com/a/762098803

Donny Wals - Combine:
https://gumroad.com/a/909014131

Mark Moeyken’s SwiftUI Books:
www.bigmountainstudio.com/swiftui-views-book/fzc51

Objc.io Books (Thinking in SwiftUI & Advanced Swift):
https://gumroad.com/a/656585843

snippet.title: ‘When I die, I don’t want Friends to be the first thing that’s mentioned:’ Matthew Perry #shorts
snippet.description:
Ottawa-raised actor Matthew Perry, known as Chandler Bing on Friends, was found dead in his hot tub over the weekend. He was 54. An investigation into how he died is ongoing, and it may take weeks before his cause of death is determined.

In a CBC Q interview from November 2022, Perry talked about his memoir, Friends, Lovers, and the Big Terrible Thing, which details his long journey with addiction, fame and recovery.  

He told Q host Tom Power why he didn’t want to be remembered only for Friends, but his work to help people with addiction.

localized.title: ‘When I die, I don’t want Friends to be the first thing that’s mentioned:’ Matthew Perry #shorts
localized.description:
Ottawa-raised actor Matthew Perry, known as Chandler Bing on Friends, was found dead in his hot tub over the weekend. He was 54. An investigation into how he died is ongoing, and it may take weeks before his cause of death is determined.

In a CBC Q interview from November 2022, Perry talked about his memoir, Friends, Lovers, and the Big Terrible Thing, which details his long journey with addiction, fame and recovery.  

He told Q host Tom Power why he didn’t want to be remembered only for Friends, but his work to help people with addiction. 

Read more: http://www.cbc.ca/news

snippet.description:

snippet.title: ✨ Ellen Pompeo ✨ CALLING OUT Porter magazine on Lack of Diversity at their own Shoot 💁🏼‍♀️ | #shorts
snippet.description:
This was SO fierce. 💃

Ellen Pompeo from Grey's Anatomy giving it straight to the crew of Porter magazine at their own roundtable shoot. 😂

This round table included Gina Rodriguez, Gabrielle Union and Emma Roberts, and they spoke about the pay gap, gender equality and diversity among other subjects. It's such a must-watch 🙏

On a personal note, I showed this to a established stylist that has consistently worked at Porter magazine and his reaction was: Yep. That Porter office is very... white. 😬
